title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
